title: ai-review reviewer output
description: Final-message shape the codex-cli backend is constrained to via `codex exec --output-schema`. Mirrors the JSON contract in reviewer/review-prompt.md and reviewer/proposal-review-prompt.md. `area` enumerates BOTH the code-review areas (A_*..E_*/other) and the proposal-review lenses (R1_*..R8_*) so one schema serves both REVIEW_KINDs; the kind's prompt tells the model which subset to use. This enum is kept in sync with scripts/pr_log.schema.json so a schema-valid Codex finding never violates the pr_log area enum when logged.
